2026-07-02.title: A pet psychic on my fyp was talking to a cat. The cat claims to have been a truck in a past life.  Consciousness is a tricky thing; it’s not even within the current means of science to prove other people are conscious. So how could we know if AI is conscious? Or a truck? Or everything? 🌀

2026-07-03.title: Gaslight, gatekeep, girlboss 💅🏼♟️ I’m reading ‘The 48 Laws of Power’ so you don’t have to. Let’s even the playing field.

posts.title: Temp check 🌡️ Do you remember how you found out that llm’s like chat gpt exist?

A pet psychic on my fyp was talking to a cat. The cat claims to have been a truck in a past life.  Consciousness is a tricky thing; it’s not even within the current means of science to prove other people are conscious. So how could we know if AI is conscious? Or a truck? Or everything? 🌀
Gaslight, gatekeep, girlboss 💅🏼♟️ I’m reading ‘The 48 Laws of Power’ so you don’t have to. Let’s even the playing field.
